response.overview: On December 8th, 1983, the Hanukiller's reign of terror came to an end. Now, 40 years later, he's back for another spin of the dreidel. A TORAH-fying new tale of HORAH, a Festival of Frights, Hanukkah spins you into madness from dreidel to the grave. Jason can have them on Friday, Obediah will be observing the Sabbath.
response.title: Hanukkah Uncut
